body_preview: - CRITICAL assessment finding: `memory/active_learnings.md` is 80 lines of gen0 content (Days 51-67 only). yyds has operated for 53 days since branching (Day 65 → 118) and has written 255 total entries in `memory/learnings.jsonl` spanning days 8-118. The active context file contains none of the yyds-specific learnings (days 68-118). - Distribution: 49 recent
expected_evidence: Future session prompts include yyds-native learnings (days 68-118) in SELF-WISDOM section. The stale gen0-only content (days 51-67 only) is replaced by full 255-entry coverage with correct tiered compression. State events show active_learnings.md was modified with substantial new content. title: Regenerate active learnings from learnings.jsonl with deterministic synthesis
